items.title: Pebblebee’s Halo can help track lost items and keep you safe, and it’s on sale for $50

items.title: People are leaving a lot of weird stuff in their robotaxis
items.description: A unicorn Beanie Baby. A 15-pound green bowling ball. A pair of dentures.
